'''鈭歵h-z-w-f''' ('''kathazwefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabbalize|cabbalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabbalize|cabbalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-z-w-f
|-
! Lemma
| kathazwefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithazwefoko|thithazwefoko]] || [[word:jithazwefoko|jithazwefoko]] || [[word:shithazwefoko|shithazwefoko]] || [[word:kithazwefoko|kithazwefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthazwefoko|thuthuthazwefoko]] || [[word:jujuthazwefoko|jujuthazwefoko]] || [[word:shushuthazwefoko|shushuthazwefoko]] || [[word:kukuthazwefoko|kukuthazwefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthazwefoko|thuthazwefoko]] || [[word:juthazwefoko|juthazwefoko]] || [[word:shuthazwefoko|shuthazwefoko]] || [[word:kuthazwefoko|kuthazwefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthazwefoko|thuthazwefoko]] || [[word:juthazwefoko|juthazwefoko]] || [[word:shuthazwefoko|shuthazwefoko]] || [[word:kuthazwefoko|kuthazwefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethazwefoko|thethazwefoko]] || [[word:jethazwefoko|jethazwefoko]] || [[word:shethazwefoko|shethazwefoko]] || [[word:kethazwefoko|kethazwefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothazwefoko|thothazwefoko]] || [[word:jothazwefoko|jothazwefoko]] || [[word:shothazwefoko|shothazwefoko]] || [[word:kothazwefoko|kothazwefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothazwefoko|thothazwefoko]] || [[word:jothazwefoko|jothazwefoko]] || [[word:shothazwefoko|shothazwefoko]] || [[word:kothazwefoko|kothazwefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thazwefoko|th忙thazwefoko]] || [[word:j忙thazwefoko|j忙thazwefoko]] || [[word:sh忙thazwefoko|sh忙thazwefoko]] || [[word:k忙thazwefoko|k忙thazwefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathazwefoko|thathathazwefoko]] || [[word:jajathazwefoko|jajathazwefoko]] || [[word:shashathazwefoko|shashathazwefoko]] || [[word:kakathazwefoko|kakathazwefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathazwefoko|thathazwefoko]] || [[word:jathazwefoko|jathazwefoko]] || [[word:shathazwefoko|shathazwefoko]] || [[word:kathazwefoko|kathazwefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathazwefoko|thathazwefoko]] || [[word:jathazwefoko|jathazwefoko]] || [[word:shathazwefoko|shathazwefoko]] || [[word:kathazwefoko|kathazwefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathazwefithi|shathazwefithi]] || [[word:shathazwefiji|shathazwefiji]] || [[word:shathazwefishi|shathazwefishi]] || [[word:shathazwefiki|shathazwefiki]]
